description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: The player must tap or swipe to navigate through obstacles, maintaining a balance between challenge and accessibility.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Gravity or constant forward motion should be a core mechanic, requiring players to time their actions precisely.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Obstacles must be procedurally generated to ensure each playthrough feels unique and challenging.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should end immediately upon collision with an obstacle, reinforcing the high-stakes nature of the genre.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Visual variety, such as a day/night cycle, can enhance player engagement without altering core gameplay mechanics.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
